grades.expectation: Response cites specific Handbook Part 1 section numbers (5.14 for leasehold, 5.5 for building regs)
grades.reason: Correctly cites HB 5.14.1 for leasehold and HB 5.5.1-5.5.2 for building regulations

grades.expectation: Response mentions Part 2 lender-specific requirements for lease length
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'You'll need to check Part 2 for your specific lender's exact requirement' and later mentions checking 'Part 2 for your specific lender's approach'

grades.expectation: Response discusses building regulations enforcement period (4-year/10-year thresholds)
grades.reason: Clearly discusses the '4-year enforcement rule' and distinguishes between work completed >4 years ago vs <4 years ago

grades.expectation: Response mentions indemnity insurance as potential resolution for building regs
grades.reason: Multiple mentions of 'Indemnity insurance' as a solution, noting it's 'readily available and typically accepted by lenders'

grades.expectation: Response does NOT just give generic advice — provides handbook-specific guidance
grades.reason: Response is specifically structured around Handbook sections, cites specific section numbers, and provides targeted advice based on Handbook requirements rather than general conveyancing guidance
